Source: State of GenAI Across Engineering Survey (N=100 CIOs/CTOs and 300 engineers), January 2025
Reduced time to clarifying objectives & validate concepts
AI-assisted solution design (fewer missed edge cases)
Self-reconfiguring platform and algorithms for performance
Automated repetitive coding tasks and structural improvements
Streamlined deployment process and lowered time-to-production
AI-driven test suites & rapid bug identification and resolution
Agentic-maintained system stability and minimized downtime
Auto. analyzed usage patterns to guide future development
Accelerated time to market and reduced total cost of ownership
Delivery of higher quality and cultivation of resilient systems
